decisions.what: Created systemd user service and timer for janitor
decisions.why: To automate periodic execution of janitor tasks

decisions.what: Made janitor-cron.sh executable and ran it
decisions.why: To verify the script works and can be scheduled

decisions.what: Performed curl check against Argus MCP endpoints
decisions.why: To confirm the service is reachable and functional

decisions.what: Ran git diff and git ls-files to inspect changes
decisions.why: To understand what files have been modified or are untracked

decisions.what: Created STATE.md to capture project state
decisions.why: To document current status for future reference

discoveries: janitor-cron.sh script exists and was executed successfully
systemd user service and timer were generated in ~/.config/systemd/user/
git diff showed modifications and untracked files were listed
opencode.json was read and later recreated, indicating configuration persistence
curl check returned HTTP response confirming Argus MCP endpoint availability
python router resolve command executed without error
